bio:
Eddie and I are beyond excited to be planning our special day! We met through mutual friends and instantly connected over our shared love of adventure and good food. As we say, Love recognizes no barriers. It jumps hurdles, leaps fences, penetrates walls to arrive at its destination full of hope.

Our day-to-day is filled with wedding planning bliss – from trying out cake tastings to finalizing our venue decor. We're working closely with our wedding planner to bring our vision to life. Eddie's been amazing to work with, and we're both thrilled to be on this journey together. Let's make our wedding dreams a reality!
We're a test account (Teresa and Josh)
